notableEvents.label: Will Benson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Benson flies out to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Mateo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Mateo grounds into a double play, third baseman Sal Stewart to second baseman Spencer Steer to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Mike Yastrzemski out at 2nd. Jorge Mateo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley plunked
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley hit by pitch. Dominic Smith to 2nd.
